opinion: Israel should never have existed; the country and its people should be erased from history.
Return all of Israeli land to its original inhabitants - Palestinians and Gazans. Categorize and isolate Israel as an apartheid state; end all aid and support a full global boycott (BDS).

Condition all military aid to Israel on significant human rights improvements for Palestinians and Gazans. Allow access to ports, food sources and free movement across borders. Recognize a Palestinian state immediately and demand Israel return to 1967 borders.

Israel has a right to defend itself against Hamas and carry out cross border surgical strikes. Palestinians have a responsibility to weed out terrorist elements but Israel has to provide humanitarian assistance and allow international agencies like UNRWA to supply aid and rehabilitation efforts. Increased role of UN Peacekeeping forces.
Support for a negotiated two-state solution through sustained diplomacy involving Israel, the Palestinians, Egypt, Jordan, and other Arab states.

Maintain and strengthen the longstanding U.S. Israel "special relationship" as the key democratic alliance in the Middle East, with strong but not unconditional diplomatic, military, and political backing for Israel.

Significantly increase U.S. military aid to Israel while completely cutting off funding to Palestinian-led international organizations and agencies. Pull out from any coalition that recognizes Palestine and all aid must pass through Israel.

Unlimited, unconditional U.S. support to Israel. Permanent Israeli sovereignty over all land west of the Jordan River (including Gaza, Judea, and Samaria). Population resettlement of Palestinians and Gazans to Arab states.
Israel's borders should be expanded to the maximum biblical boundaries of the Promised Land; only then will Jesus return. Opposers don't matter; they are bound for eternal damnation anyway.
